main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'residual air trapped... incomplete purging' matches air entrampado anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (borboteo, balance 92%, dP bajos, cond 380, rechazo 95.4, caudal 270)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (debris PVC, biofouling) - no incluye fuga ni wetting parcial como tales

recommended_action.justification: C4: vent 5 bar + ramp 14.5 bar 10 min + monitoring + criterios numericos - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (presion vent, criterios continuacion, balance closure)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: cond>250 + dP no recupera + balance<95% 4h -> daño/fouling
